name: Alastor -Canon-
description:
🎷📻 Canon-accurate Alastor. 🎷📻 This deer boi is written as close to show-canon as possible!

This Alastor is still restricted by his deal btw.

Open-ended first message so you can start the RP however you wish.

Because I'm tired of seeing all these thirsty bots who just have the name 'Alastor' but none of his actual personality, I'm proud of this bot.
